name: MultihopSwapRouter

methods.name: execute_swap_2hop

args.name: intermediate_asset
args.desc: The intermediate asset in the path

args.name: pool1_app_id
args.desc: Application ID of first DEX pool

args.name: pool2_app_id
args.desc: Application ID of second DEX pool

args.name: receiver
args.desc: Account to receive the final output

methods.desc:
Execute a 2-hop swap: Input -> Intermediate -> Output
Now supports multiple DEX adapters (Tinyman, Pact, etc.)

methods.name: execute_swap_3hop
methods.desc:
Execute a 3-hop swap: Input -> Int1 -> Int2 -> Output
Similar to 2-hop but with an additional intermediate step

methods.name: execute_swap_algo_to_asa
methods.desc:
Execute single-hop swap from ALGO to ASA
Special case handling for ALGO (asset ID 0)

methods.name: opt_into_asset
methods.desc:
Opt the contract into an asset to hold it
Must be called before the contract can receive any ASA

methods.name: withdraw_asset
methods.desc:
Emergency withdrawal function (only creator)
Allows contract creator to recover stuck funds

desc:
Multihop Swap Router Contract
    
    This contract enables atomic swaps across multiple DEX pools
    by routing through the optimal path determined off-chain.

sourceInfo.errorMessage: First txn must be asset transfer
